rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"External npm packages can be verified by reading their installed CLI binaries in node_modules rather than modifying source code","scope":"verification"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Chore/verification tasks that don't modify source are classified as low-risk and don't require implementation beyond a verdict file","scope":"task classification"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"pnpm's node_modules layout uses scoped paths like .pnpm/@kody-ade+engine@0.4.0_*/node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/ — glob patterns needed for path-agnostic lookup","scope":"pnpm monorepo"}]}
